name: Honey Curried Red Snapper
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together Dijon mustard, honey, lemon juice, curry powder, and salt.
2. Place fish fillets in a 9-inch square baking dish coated with cooking spray.
3. Pour the mustard sauce over the top of the fish fillets.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
5. Uncover and broil for an additional 20 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with paprika and chopped parsley.
7. Serve immediately. Serves 2, approximately 190 calories per serving.
